aboutMe.experience: I'm a frontend developer with over 3 years of experience creating modern web applications. I specialize in React, Next.js and TypeScript, always looking for the best solutions for each project.
aboutMe.focus: My focus is on writing clean code, creating intuitive interfaces and optimizing performance to offer the best possible user experience.
aboutMe.hobbies: In my free time, I like to go to the gym, play beach tennis or video games with friends.
